headline: INDUSTRIAL
{highlight}PRECISION{/highlight} SOLUTIONS
hero.subtitle: Delivering world-class hydraulic equipment and engineering services to India's heavy industry sector with uncompromising quality and reliability.

title: ENGINEERING EXCELLENCE
FROM THE HEART OF INDIA
paragraphs: Founded in Jamshedpur, the cradle of India's industrial revolution, Applied Engineering & Service has emerged as a trusted partner for heavy industries across Eastern India. Our strategic location in the steel city positions us at the epicenter of manufacturing excellence.

We specialize in providing precision hydraulic equipment, industrial maintenance solutions, and turnkey engineering services to steel plants, power generation facilities, and heavy manufacturing units.
